codeReview.summary: Feature adds 15 comprehensive integration tests for task interruption (pause/resume/redirect) functionality. The tests verify existing implementations of pause_task, resume_task, and inject_instruction in the state machine and orchestrator. All VAL-OBS-008 assertions are covered including state transitions, error cases, scope modification, and checkpoint preservation.

issues.description: Missing test case: inject_instruction into terminal states (Accepted/Rejected) should return an error. The state_machine.rs:320-323 shows this is a valid error case, but no test verifies this behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature specifies skillName 'rust-worker' which does not exist at .factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md. The transcript shows worker loaded both 'mission-worker-base' and 'rust-worker' skills, but only 'mission-worker-base' is present in .factory/skills/. This may have left the worker without proper procedural guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:skillName = 'rust-worker' but ls .factory/skills/ shows no rust-worker/ directory. Transcript shows: 'Skill rust-worker' was requested but skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true, suggesting the worker proceeded without the intended skill guidance.

summary: Review passes. The feature adds 15 integration tests validating pause/resume/redirect functionality for VAL-OBS-008. Implementation correctly delegates to existing state machine methods. One non-blocking gap: missing test for injecting into terminal states (Accepted/Rejected). Skill reference issue noted: 'rust-worker' skill specified in feature does not exist.
